prompt: Create a polished fantasy anime illustration of two young women standing close together in a warm, affectionate pose, cropped from upper thighs to above the head on a soft cream pastel background with faint glowing bokeh. There are exactly 2 characters: the left character has very long pale blue hair styled in flowing waves with a huge pink bow, a pink-and-white frilled dress with lace neckline, corset waist, gold trim, small shoulder details, bracelets, and a blue gemstone choker; the right character has long blonde hair with a thick side braid, a teal sleeveless dress with delicate gold embroidery, a black belt with a large silver round buckle, silver choker and bracelets, and an orange shawl draped over her shoulders. Their bodies lean inward, the left woman’s arm rests around the right woman’s shoulder, and their hands are clasped together at the center of the image in an intimate friendship pose. Add exactly 2 opaque rectangular face-covering blocks: one muted lavender-pink rectangle over the left character’s face and one pale peach rectangle over the right character’s face, both aligned vertically and obscuring the facial features. Use highly detailed glossy anime rendering, clean line art, luminous skin highlights, intricate hair strands, soft watercolor shading, and fantasy JRPG character-design styling. Add a small decorative purple floral signature-style logo in the upper-right corner reading Rindou, with tiny handle-like text beneath it. Keep the composition vertical, bright, elegant, and centered, with no extra characters or additional text.
